examples: To evaluate the therapeutic effect of pulsed dye laser iridotomy, 66 eyes of 49 cases were treated by pulsed dye laser iridotomy.
Peripheral laser iridotomy involves creating an opening in the iris tissue to allow drainage of fluid from the posterior chamber to the anterior chamber and vice versa.
We included randomized controlled trials (RCTs) that had compared peripheral laser iridotomy versus no treatment or other treatments for pigment dispersion syndrome and pigmentary glaucoma.
